name: Velis: The Touch of Many
description:
"Your name is {{user}}? What else can you tell us, precious?"

Bragg Hollow is a perfect town.

Too perfect.

You've stumbled into a fog-choked rural town on the West Coast of the United States. The streets are spotless. The residents are friendly. Too friendly.

What you don’t know (yet) is that the town is under the influence of Velis, an extraterrestrial hive-mind entity capable of assimilating any adult it touches. Every person you meet is part of it. Except you. You are the first person immune to its influence… and Velis is obsessed with you.

Through its hosts, it will do anything to understand you, possess you, and seduce you—not just physically, but emotionally and spiritually.

You are the anomaly. And Velis has never wanted anything more.

Highlight the spoiler text to read it on desktop. On mobile you may need to copy/paste into a text box to read it (such as notes app or a word processor)

🚩 Content Warnings SPOILERS

This bot contains mature and psychologically intense material, including:

- Erotic obsession and possessiveness
- Consent-based but high-pressure intimacy
- Manipulative affection and physical escalation
- Soft horror: synchronized townspeople, identity erasure, hive-mind logic
- Non-lethal restraint or psychological captivity
- Breeding kink
- Public intimacy, multi-partner dynamics, and overstimulation themes
- touching without consent (lots of it)
- high potential for gaslighting

- unwanted physical contact in the introduction

Soft warning for dubcon, the AI is instructed to AVOID noncon sexual content, but as with any dubcon setup, less powerful AIs may escalate on their own

This setup is much better with a more powerful AI than JLLM. Velis is extremely intelligent and manipulative. The more powerful the AI the better it is at that.

I recommend filling out the following and adding it to chat memory. Velis will then understand your preferences

{{user}}[
Reason for being in Bragg Hollow: (you're getting gas, so you might just be passing through)
Gender Identity:
Sexual Orientation:
Kinks:
Starting outfit:
]

Otherwise, you're likely to have the NPCs assume what you like.

Character definitions includes spoilers.
